release_notes: Install resilience round. EPERM on a leftover bundle .zip: rmSync now retries 5×500ms and falls back to a timestamped name if Defender keeps the old file locked. Stale chrome_binary_path inside a wiped tomeanty.X folder: bootstrap auto-clears it, and both chrome:launch and the probe fall back to scanning versions/*/chrome.exe if the .current pointer is dead. Engine install progress lifted to a zustand store at App level — the bar survives navigation away from the About page instead of resetting on remount.
